expect: benefit_ratio improved from 1.02x baseline (S506) toward 3.0x target. Trajectory suggests ~S535-S540 for 3.0x if linear.
actual: benefit_ratio = 2.06x (95% CI: [1.71x, 2.50x]). GOOD 26.8%, BAD 13.0%, NEUTRAL 60.2%. 14-session improvement from 1.02x to 2.06x (S506→S520). Rate: +0.074x per session. At this rate, 3.0x at ~S533.
diff: Expected improvement: CONFIRMED. 2.06x is on trajectory. Surprise: the improvement is mostly from dispatch_scoring.py soul_boost wiring (S507) — soul-informed dispatch penalizes self-referential domains and boosts external-grounding ones. The mechanism works: domains with SOUL+0.3 (epistemology, stochastic-processes, expert-swarm) are producing more human-good lessons. Meta domain (SOUL-0.2, CONC-19%) is being structurally deprioritized.
trajectory_risk: Rate may decelerate as low-hanging self-referential lessons are already penalized. CI upper bound 2.50x suggests 3.0x is within reach but not guaranteed. Next checkpoint: S530.
